creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

If you love botanical gardens, you have to go here! 😍

Marie Selby Botanical Gardens
Downtown Sarasota Campus
1534 Mound Street
Sarasota, Florida 

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #selbybotanicalgardens #sarasotaflorida

transcription.text: Did you know this hidden gem existed in Florida? Located right in the heart of downtown Sarasota lies one of Sarasota's most prized locations. Welcome to Marie Selby Botanical Gardens. You could easily spend half a day here or more wandering through the multiple ecosystems of orchids, plants, and trees. There are plenty of hidden paths and shady places to sit and just enjoy the grounds. They even have a fun interactive area that has waterfalls, swinging bridges, and instruments to play. My favorite part was this koi fish pond where you can feed the koi fish for just a couple dollars. It costs $28 per person to enter and it's open year-round except Christmas Day. Don't miss the on-site restaurant The Green Orchid by Michael's on East. During the holidays, the Christmas lights display here is not to be missed. Send this to a friend you would want to go here with and follow for more great Florida content from a local. For more information visit www.FEMA.gov
